about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A curious engineer exploring ideas through technology, books, music and writing.
bio: I graduated from IIT Kanpur and enjoy building systems, solving difficult problems, and exploring ideas across disciplines.
My interests span machine learning, robotics, software engineering, philosophy, music and writing.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Always happy to discuss ideas, books, music, technology, or anything interesting.
intro: If something on this website resonates with you, feel free to reach out.
I'm particularly interested in conversations around technology, engineering, philosophy, writing and music.

hero.name: Yuval Bansal
hero.title: Engineer. Reader. Musician. Writer.
hero.description: Exploring ideas through technology, music, books and writing.
statusItems: Currently thinking about: Meaning and Fulfilment

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.subtitle: A snapshot of what occupies my attention these days.

timelineSection.title: Journey
timelineSection.subtitle: A few milestones that shaped who I am.

timeline.title: Started at IIT Kanpur
timeline.description: Began my journey in Mechanical Engineering while exploring programming, robotics and technology.

timeline.title: Competitive Programming
timeline.description: Developed strong problem-solving skills and became active in competitive programming.

timeline.title: Inter IIT Tech Meet
timeline.description: Worked on challenging engineering projects and earned medals representing IIT Kanpur.

timeline.title: Data Engineering Internship
timeline.description: Built ETL systems, machine learning pipelines and production-ready solutions.

timeline.title: Graduation
timeline.description: Completed my degree while continuing to explore software, AI, writing and music.

quotes.quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Nietzsche

quotes.quote: We are what we repeatedly do.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Man is condemned to be free.
quotes.author: Jean-Paul Sartre

musicPage.title: Soundtrack
musicPage.subtitle: Music that has accompanied different chapters of my life.
musicPage.description: From classic rock and blues to film scores and soul, these are the artists whose work continues to inspire me.

artists.name: The Beatles
artists.note: Timeless songwriting, constant reinvention, and a catalogue that continues to influence generations of musicians.

artists.name: Pink Floyd
artists.note: Immersive albums that blend music, philosophy, and storytelling into unforgettable journeys.

artists.name: Olivia Dean
artists.note: Warm vocals, intimate songwriting, and a refreshing sense of sincerity and optimism.

artists.name: Radiohead
artists.note: Restless experimentation and deeply introspective songwriting that rewards repeated listening.

artists.name: Taylor Swift
artists.note: A remarkable ability to transform personal experiences into songs that resonate with millions.

artists.name: Bob Dylan
artists.note: Poetic lyricism and storytelling that blur the line between music and literature.

booksPage.title: Library
booksPage.subtitle: Books that shaped how I think.
booksPage.description: A collection of books that influenced my ideas, challenged my assumptions and expanded my perspective.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.note: A sweeping exploration of human history, from hunter-gatherers to modern civilizations.

books.title: Why I Am an Atheist
books.author: Bhagat Singh
books.note: A thoughtful and courageous defense of rational inquiry, skepticism, and intellectual independence.

books.title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
books.author: Mahatma Gandhi
books.note: An honest account of Gandhi's lifelong pursuit of truth, self-discipline, and moral growth.

books.title: The Stranger
books.author: Albert Camus
books.note: A powerful existential novel exploring absurdity, meaning, and the human condition.

books.title: Zero to One
books.author: Peter Thiel
books.note: A provocative perspective on innovation, startups, and building things that have never existed before.

books.title: Man's Search for Meaning
books.author: Viktor E. Frankl
books.note: A profound reflection on suffering, resilience, and humanity's search for purpose.

thoughtsPage.title: Thoughts
thoughtsPage.subtitle: Poems, journals and articles.
thoughtsPage.description: Some writings are records of moments. Some are attempts to understand the world. Others are simply questions.

poems.title: The Weight of Rain
poems.excerpt: A poem about memory and time.

poems.title: Midnight Lanterns
poems.excerpt: Fragments of light scattered across a silent night.

poems.title: Sea of Dust
poems.excerpt: A meditation on distance, silence and passing seasons.

journals.title: A Walk Through Campus
journals.excerpt: Thoughts from an ordinary evening that felt unexpectedly significant.

journals.title: Summer in Gurgaon
journals.excerpt: Notes from a season of work, uncertainty and growth.

articles.title: Meaning and Fulfilment
articles.excerpt: Thoughts on purpose, commitment and happiness.

articles.title: The Value of Difficult Problems
articles.excerpt: Why challenging pursuits often become the most rewarding ones.

articles.title: Technology and Curiosity
articles.excerpt: Exploring the relationship between learning, creativity and technology.
